name: travel-explorer-backend
description: Backend API for Travel Explorer app using Supabase Edge Functions

scripts.deploy:auth: supabase functions deploy auth/login && supabase functions deploy auth/signup && supabase functions deploy auth/me
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:auth && npm run deploy:entities && npm run deploy:integrations && npm run deploy:external
scripts.test: npm run test:auth && npm run test:entities

author: Travel Explorer Team
